TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_busi, title = busi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/busi} }

S.FORM: alang busi ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go kwara sali buwan nya ga 69 buwan, 249 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 232 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 17 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 85%, Tayan 4%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Truku 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na busi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na busi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na busi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na busi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na busi hya' ga kobah. tay mkyahu' na busi hya' ga sadu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang busi ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go kwara sali buwan nya ga 69 buwan, 249 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 232 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 17 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 85%, Tayan 4%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Truku 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na busi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na busi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na busi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na busi hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na busi hya' ga kobah. tay mkyahu' na busi hya' ga sadu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βus~ɕi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βus~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na βus~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βus~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βus~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βus~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa koβaħ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βus~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕa*u. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
